title: Waste to Wealth Exhibition cum Competition
content:
4813/2025-2026

Aizawl the 12th March, 2026:Vawiin March ni 12 (Ningani) khân Mizoram Pollution Control Board (MPCB) chuan Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall-ah School leh College Eco-club-te tân thil/bungrua hman hlui/hluihlâwn tawh atanga thil hlû leh tangkai dang siamchhuah leh pho lanna leh inelna hun Waste to Wealth Exhibition cum Competition a buatsaih. He hunah hian Mizoram hmun hrang hrang atangin zirlai naupangte’n thil hlui chi hrang hrang atanga an thil siam chhuah an pho chhuak a ni. He Exhibition cum Competition hi Category pathuma then niin Category I-ah Primary leh Middle School an inel a, Category II-ah High School leh Higher Secondary School-te leh Category III-ah College leh a chunglam. Category tina lâwmman latute chu Pu Liankima Lailung, IFS (Rtd.), Chairman, MPCB-in lâwmman pawisa-fai leh Certificate a hlân a ni.

He Exhibition cum Competition-in a tum ber chu zirlai naupangte bawlhhlawh neih/tihtlêm pawimawhna zirtir bâkah bawlhhlawh nei tlêm tura kan thil duh tawh lohte paih nghal mai loa thil tangkai danga hmanna zawn (re-use) tangkaina kawh hmuha sumpaia chantir a nih theihzia hriattir a ni. Vawiin programme MPCB-in a buatsaih hi Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change bul tuma Environment Education Programme (EEP) kal tlanga neih a ni.

title: Mamit-ah Fisheries Department huaihawtin Aquaculture Insurance Awareness neih a ni
content:
4812/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 12th of March, 2026 :Vawiin khan National Fisheries Development Board leh Fisheries Department, Mamit District tangkawp buatsaihin Darlak Community Hall-ah Aquaculture Insurance Awareness Campaign a buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian khuarel chhiatna avanga tuikhuah chhiate leh sangha dam lohna hrang hrangte avanga sangha chan te'n an tuikhuah leh sangha te an lo insure ve theih dan tur inzirtirna neih a ni a. Zirtirna hi National Fisheries Development Board atang leh Aquaculture Insurance Company atangin online hmanga neih niin, Pu Lalropara, Fisheries Extension Officer leh Pi Rosalind Vansangkimi, District Programme Manager te'n he hun hi an hmanpui a ni.

Vawiin hian tuikhuah nei mi 50 an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: South Vanlaiphai-ah buh chi chhuak thar Nutrients pai tam bik variety DRR Dhan 67 & 69 chungchang inhrilhhriatna nei
content:
4811/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 12th March, 2026:Vawiin khan KVK, Lunglei District Hnahthial leh The Indian Council of Agricultural Research:Indian Institute of Rice Research (ICAR-IIRR) Hyderabad te tangkawp chuan South Vanlaiphai Community Hall-ah Buh chi chhuak thar Nutrients pai tam bik variety DRR Dhan 67 & 69 chungchang inhrilhhriatna neih a ni.

He hun hi Dr. Henry Saplalrinliana, Senior Scientist & Head, KVK Lunglei chuan kaihruaiin DR CN Neeraja, Principal Scientist leh DR. Kalyani M. Barbadikar, Senior Scientist, ICAR-IIRR, Hyderabad ten kuthnathawktute hnenah buh chi thar chungchang hi an zirtir a. He buh chi thar hi kuthnathawktute hnenah an sem nghal bawk. Pu Timothy Lalrinfela, Subject Matter Specialist (Soil Science) pawhin Soil Test Kit hman dan zirtirna neiin practical neih nghal a ni a. Mithiam kalkhawmte hian kuthnathawktute nen inkawmhona hun hmang in, kuthnathawktute hnenah an buh enkawlna tura an mamawh chi hrang hrangte an sem nghal bawk.

title: High School academic calendar chungchang School Education Minister pisa-ah ngaihtuah ho a ni
content:
4810/2025-2026

12.03.2026:Vawiin khan School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana kaihhruainain High School academic calendar chungchang chu a pisa-ah School Education Department official-te nen sawi ho a ni.

Meeting hian Mizoram Education Reforms Committee ṭhut khawm vawi 14-na leh 15-na rawtna chu zir hovin a ngaihtuah a. Kum 2026-2027 High School academic session chu April ni 1, 2026 (Nilaini)-ah ṭan ni se tiin a rel.

First Term exam leh result puan chu July ni 7 aṭanga July ni 17, 2026 chhunga peih fel hman tura tih a ni a. Second term chu July ni 21, 2026-a ṭan tura tih niin exam leh result puan chu October ni 19 aṭanga October ni 30, 2026 chhunga peih fel tura tih a ni.

Third term hi November ni 3, 2026-a ṭan tura tih niin December ni 21, 2026 aṭanga January ni 5, 2027 inkar chu thlasik chawlh atana tih a ni a. Third term exam leh result puan hi January ni 18, 2027 aṭanga January ni 29, 2027 chhunga tih fel tura rel a ni.

HSLC examination chu February 2027 chhunga buatsaih ni se tih a ni a. Higher Secondary School chu a ngai anga kal tura rel tawh sa niin April ni 1, 2026-ah class kal ṭan tur a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE COMMISSION FOR WOMEN On International Women’s Day, 2026 “Maha Jan Sunwai” hmeichhiate harsatna tawk te tan FREE LEGAL PUBLIC HEARING NEIH A NI
content:
4809/2025-2026

Aizawl the 12th March, 2026 :International Women’s Day denchhenin National Commission for Women, New Delhi leh State Commission for Women chuan India ram pumah“Maha Jan Sunwai” (Free Legal Public Hearing)a buatsaih a ni.

International Women’s Day hi Mizoram pumpui District zawng zawngah dt.9th March – 13th March, 2026chhung hian hlawhtling tak hman a ni. He hun hi Mizoram State Commission for Women mai bakah District tina Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, District Legal Services Authority leh Women & Child Development te atangin an hmanpui a ni.

Hmeichhia dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuar te chuan he hunah hian complaint an thehlut a. In chhungkhura hleilenna eng kawng pawha tawk te, nupa kar harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thleng te, hnathawhna hmuna thawhpui mipa te atanga harsatna tawk te, chhaih nawmnah tawk te leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleilenna leh nekchepna tawk tan harsatna a thlen theih ang.

“Mahila Jan Sunwai” (Free Legal Public Hearing) hi a tawp ber leh a hmawr bawkna atan vawiin 12th March, 2026 hian Aizawl-ah Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan a buatsaih a. Superintendent of Police, Aizawl District; Deputy Commissioner, Aizawl District; Mizoram State Legal Services Authority; District Legal Services Authority leh Women & Child Development te atangin an rawn hmanpui a. Case hi 14 (Sawmpali) dawn a ni a, hengte hi ngaihtuah nghal a ni a, an harsatna a zirin chinfel nghal a ni a, chinfel mai theih loh te chu legal aid pek an ni.

Mizoram State Commission for WomenchuanInternational Women’s Day, 2026denchhena“Mahila Jan Sunwai” (Free Legal Public Hearing)Mizoram pumpui-a hlawhtling taka a buatsaih thei hi lawmawm a ti hle a ni. He hun denchhena Mizoram puma case lut hi 60 (Sawmruk) a ni a, a tam zawk hi chinfel sak theih an ni a, case dangzawng a hmuna chinfel theih loh te hi District Legal Services Authority, Police, One Stop Centre, Protection Officer (Domestic Violence), Court, Child Welfare Committee-ah te refer an ni.

Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan Mizoram hmun kilkhawra hmeichhe harsatna neite, hmunpui rawn pan thei si lo te tana International Women’s Day denchhena Free Legal Public Hearing neih hi tha a tiin, hun reilote chhunga hmeichhia tam tak ten an lo chhawr tangkai hi lawmawm a ti takzet a ni.

Attachment

title: Jal Mahotsav kalpui mek-ah vawiin khan Jal Arpan Diwas hun hman niin Pangzawl khaw tui lak inhlanna hun hman a ni
content:
4808/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, 12th March, 2026:Jal Mahotsav kalpui mek-ah vawiin khan Pangzawl Community Hall-ah PHED Hnahthial WATSAN Division hmalakna in Jal Arpan Diwas hman niin Pangzawl tui lakna chu PHED Hnahthial WATSAN Division chuan Pangzawl khawtlang hnenah an hlan a, he hun hi District Bawrhsap leh Chairman, Hnahthial District Water and Sanitation Mission ni bawk, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a ni.

Khuallian chuan Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) hnuaia hmalakna in India ram pumpuia thingtlang khua in tinah tui connection Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC) pe vek turin a ruahman a siam thu sawiin chutiang tur chuan theihtawp chhuaha hmalak a nih thu a sawi a. Hnahthial District khaw sawmhnih pasarih (27)-ah te FHTC 5,341 pek a nih tawh thu a sawi bawk. Hun hmanna khua Pangzawl hi nakin hun zela hmasawn thei tura beiseina khua a nih avangin he program-ah hian telh hmasak a nih thu a sawi a. Tui connection FHTC hi Pangzawl-ah za ruk (600) a awm mek tih a tarlang bawk.

Inkhawm hi Pu R. Lalrinawma, VCP Pangzawl South in a kaihruai a, Hnahthial WATSAN Division enkawltu Senior Executive Engineer, Er. Lalhruaitluanga'n tui pawimawhna, humhalh a tul thu leh renchem a tul zia kalkhawmte a zirtir a, Pangzawl Village Council President te hnenah tui lak hlanna hun a hmang a, FTK inhrilhfiahna hun hman a nih hnuah Hnahthial WATSAN Sub Divisional Officer, Er. Lalhmangaihzuala’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a, hemi hnu hian kawng zawh leh khawlaia bawlhhlawh chhar faina hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: COOPERATION MINISTER-IN DEPARTMENT LOGO THAR LEH MIZORAM STATE COOPERATIVE POLICY A TLANGZARH
content:
4807/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 12th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu P.C. Vanlalruata, Minister, Cooperation Department, etc. chuan Mizoram Secretariat, MINECO-a a Office Chamber-ah Cooperation Department logo thar leh Mizoram State Cooperative Policy a tlangzarh.

Cooperation Minister Pu P.C. Vanlalruata chuan thu sawiin, department dangte nena thawhhona tha neih a pawimawhzia a tarlang a. Commissioner & Secretary cooperative society lama tui mi leh hna thiam tak an nei chu vanneihthlak a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, Cooperation Department chuan logo leh policy chungchang report pein, cooperative society-te chuan department hrang hrang kaihhnawih hna an thawh thin avangin Cooperation Department chu Mizoram sawrkar department dang zawng zawng nena inthlunzawm tlat a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram mai ni lo, India rama sawrkar department changtlung ber leh tha ber ni tura tan la turin a fuih a ni.

Tlangzarhna hun hi Pu John L.T. Sanga, Registrar, Cooperative Societies-in kaihruaiin, Minister kaihhruaina hnuaia Cooperation Department-in hma a sawn nasatzia a tarlang a. Tun Assembly Session-ah pawh tum dang aiin Cooperation chuan sawi a hlawh thu leh State Cooperative Policy pawh India ram pumpuiah state pathum chauhin an la neih thu a tarlang bawk. Pu Lalmalsawma, Joint Registrar, Cooperative Societies-in lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: PMMKSSY Insurance Division, National Fisheries Development Board (NFDB) huaihawtin Khawzawl District-a sangha khawitute hnenah Online Training pe
content:
4806/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 12th March, 2026:Vawiin khan PMMKSSY Insurance Division, National Fisheries Development Board (NFDB) huaihawtin Khawzawl District-a sangha khawitute hnenah Online Training Pi Zomuansangi Khawzawl District Fisheries Development Officer hoa neih a ni.

PMMKSSY hnuaiah hian sangha khawitute tan sangha chi, a chaw, enkawlna, labour senso, dil laihna man leh khuarel chhiatnaahte Aquaculture Insurance chi hrang hrang a awm a, he Online Training-ah hian chutiang inhrilhhriatna chu neih niin hun hlawkthlak tak hman a ni.

Attachment

title: TUIRIAL LEH MAUCHAR (NEEPCO) INKAR KAWNG SIAM DAWN VANGA KAWNG KHAR/BLOCK CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
4805/2025-2026

Aizawl the 12th March, 2026 :Tuirial leh Mauchar (NEEPCO) inkar kawng chu PWD ten siamthat hna an thawk dawn a. Chuvangin, hnathawktu ten tluang tak leh ngawrh taka an thawh theih nan leh Sr. Executive Engineer, PWD, National Highway Division-II, Aizawl, Mizoram in a rawn ngen angin Pu Zosangliana, Superintendent of Police, Aizawl, chuan Government of Mizoram Notification No. B. 12021/10/2004-TRP Dt. 01.06.2020 leh Motor Vehicle Act, 1988 (Act 59 of 1988) Section 115 in thuneihna a pek ang in a hnuai ami ang hian thupek a chhuah.

1. Dt.16.03.2026 (Monday) atanga Dt.14.04.2026 (Tuesday) thleng Tuirial leh Mauchar (NEEPCO) inkar kawngah lirthei eng chi mah tian phal a nilo.

2. PWD, NH Division-II te hian Village Council, Mauchar te nen thawkho in a tul dan ang in kawng block chhung hian mipui harsatna thlen palh thulah ruahmanna an siam ang.

He thupek hian chhiatrupna thil, kangmei leh emergency kaihhnawih a duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bik a Police leh Magistrate duty te chet velna a huam lo ang. He thupek bawhchhia chu u/s 177 & 179 Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 hmanga hrem theih an ni ang.

title: Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hoin CM Special Package thawh hnihna dawngtute infuihtharna hun hmang
content:
4804/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 12th March, 2026:The Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia CM Special Package dawng tura thlan chhuah progress partner mi 30 te chu vawiin chawhnu khan DC Pisapui Hall-ah Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma kaihhruaiin infuihtharna leh scheme chungchang inhrilhriatna hun hman a ni.

Progress partner kalkhawmte chu theihtawp chhuah turin DC chuan a fuih a. Hnathawhna tur hmanrua sawrkarin CM Special Package hmanga a pek chu a hmanna tur dik taka hmang tur leh an chhungkua theuh sum lak luh tihpun chu an koah a tla a ni tih hre turin a chah a ni. DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Mizoram Sawrkar hmalakna Bana Kaih chu India sawrkarin Vikshit Bharat a kalpui mek nen a inhne rem hle, a ti a. Sawrkar Laipuiin kum 2047 ah India ram hi ram changkang (developed country) ah siam a tum a; mi mal tin kum khat thawh chhuah (per capita income) chu a tlem berah cheng nuai 15 tal a nih theih nan tan a la dawn, a ti a. Chu dinhmun thleng thei tur chuan Bana Kaih Scheme hi a tangkai hle dawn a ni, a ti bawk.

Vawiina CM Special Package dawngtu progress partner mi 30 te hi dik leh tangkai taka hmang tura intiamkamna hming ziah tir an ni a. September 2025 a bul tan CM Special Package thawhhnihna kal meka progress partner thlanchhuahte hian an hmalakna (project) an zawh hma chu Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia ham thatna dangte an dil thei rih dawn lo a, a phase zawh hunah erawh an dil leh thei thung ang.

AH &Vety hnuaiah CM Special Package thawhhnihna dawngtu mi 18, Commerce and Industries hnuaiah mi 10, Horticulture leh Fisheries hnuaiah mi pakhat ve ve, an zavaiin mi 30 in an dawng a. Heng progress partner te hian an hmalakna te an tihhlawhtlin theih nan Sawrkar Department-a thawktuten an vil zui dawn bawk a ni.

Vawiin programme-ah hian CM Special Package thawhkhatna dawngtu, mi hlawhtlingte chanchin Success Story, Serchhip DIPR buatsaih chu tihchhuah a ni a. SDC Dr C Vanlalchhanhimi’n Scheme nihphung te a sawi a.  Progress Partner te tan an duhzawng sawina hun leh zawh duh an neih te zawhfiahna hun buatsaihsak an ni bawk.

title: SUPPLY DEPARTMENT-IN INRENCHEM TURIN NGEN
content:
4803/2025-2026

Aizawl the 12th March, 2026 :Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, Govt. of India - in thuchhuah a siam angin LPG (gas), petrol leh diesel hman tur India ramin stock a la nei hnianghnar a. Chutih laiin tun lai boruak avanga harsatna kan tawh loh nan mipuiten kan gas, petrol leh diesel kawl lai te renchem taka hmang turin kan in ngen in kan in hriattir e.

title: Khawzawlah AMRITA University Technical Team-in leilung zirchianna an nei
content:
4802/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 12th March 2026:Vawiin khan AMRITA University Technical Team chuan Khawzawl leilung zirchianna neiin Khawzawl District hotute nen an inhmu khawm.

He team hian Khawzawl Vengthar lei tlahniam an enfiah a, heta an thil hmuh leh zirchhuah te chu Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana, Chief Executive Officer,  Khawzawl DDMA ni bawk hnenah thlenin hma lak chhunzawm dan tur an sawiho a ni. He hmunah hian an hmuh danah tui put chhuak a tam a, tui tling khawm a tlem theih nan hma lak a tul thu an sawi a, luikawr inhnawh pawh then fai a ngai tih an sawi a, in sak hna kalpui lo turin an chah bawk. Addl. DC chuan in sak phal lohna thuchhuah an siam tawh thu sawiin an thurawn te an lo bawhzui zel ang tih a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah CM Special Package Phase-II semna leh District Level Briefing Programme nei
content:
4801/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 12th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah Chief Minister Special Package Phase-II semna leh training neih a ni a, Khawzawl Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n hmanpuiin, Certificate leh Placard semna a nei nghal a ni.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan thu sawiin progress partner te chu thinlung taka a lawmpui thu leh thlen chin zela hmasawn a pawimawh zia a sawi a. Sorkarin duhsak taka hmasawnna atana thawhpui tura a thlanchhuahte an nih angin a nihna ang taka hmang turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni. Hlawhtlinpui tuma, dik taka hmang tan chuan dinchhuahpui theih tura sorkarin a ruahman a nih avangin he hun hi kal leh zelna tur atana rahbi pawimawh tak a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi, chhungkua, khawtlang leh ram tana hmasawnna a nih ngei theih a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni. Sum an hmanna kawngah leh an hmasawn danah pawh Line Department te’n an enpui zel dawn a ni a ti.

Sub-Deputy Commissioner, Pu Lalrinhlua chuan report pein CM Special Package hi  Department panga (5) - Agriculture, AH & Vety, Commerce & Industry, Horticulture leh Fisheries Department atang tein progress partner mi 102 in an dawng a ni. Book keeping & financial literacy tih thupui hmangin Pu F. Malsawmtluanga, Rural Accounts Officer, DRDO in technical training a pe a, Certificate leh Placard semna hun hman a ni bawk a, Pu K. Zorammuana, Addl. DC in lawmthu sawina hun hmangin he hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitual District chhungah ASF Compensation Rs 44,93,402.24 pek chhuah a ni
content:
4800/2025-2026

Saitual, the 12th March, 2026:Kum 2024 chhunga ASF hri avanga vawk 781 suatna compensation chu February ni 26 leh March ni 11, 2026 chhungin chhungkaw 126 hnenah sem chhuah a ni. Vawk suat te hi khaw sarih (7) heng khua– Khanpuiah chhungkaw- 67 , Lailakah chhungkaw - 8, Phullenah chhungkaw -14, Saitualah chhungkaw - 4, Suangpuilawnah chhungkaw -18, Thanglailungah chhungkaw - 10 hnenah te pek chhuah a ni.

Compensation hi AH & Vety Department-a vawk suat (Culled) ngei, a hunlaia in report zawng zawng te hnenah pek vek an ni.

Attachment

title: SAIPUM RAMA ASSAM MI TEN LO VAH AN TUM NIA THU THEHDARH CHUNGCHANGAH KOLASIB DC LEH SP TEN SAIPUM KHAWTLANG HRUAITUTE AN KAWM
content:
4799/2025-2026

Kolasib, 12th March, 2026:Tunhnaia social media-a Assam lam mi thenkhatin Saipum ram chhunga lo vat a hma an la nia thehdarh a nih chungchang bawhzuiin, nimin khan Kolasib Bawrhsap Pu Robert C. Lalhmangaiha leh Senior SP Pu Lalrinpuia Varte te chuan Saipum khua tlawhin, he harsatna thleng chungchangah hian Saipum khawtlang hruaitute nen thil awmdan an sawiho.

He hunah hian Saipum khawtlang hruaitute chuan thil thlen dan tlangpui tarlangin, hnam dang ten lo vah nana hmun an rawn ruahman hi a hma chuan Mizoram sorkar hnuaia Police te duty-na thin, Chawilung Camp awmna hmun a nih thu an sawi a. Kawng chhiat avanga he hmuna Police duty te an awm theih tak loh hnuah, venhimna hna a lo chak tawk ta lo chu remchangah lain Assam lam atang hian an rawn zuam ta niin an ngaih thu an sawi bawk.

Kolasib Bawrhsap chuan he thil thleng hi Sorkar pawhin a ngaipawimawh hle tih sawiin, buaina leh inepna chhuak lova boruak muanawm tak hnuaia chinfel a nih theih dan kawng zawn chu thil tul hmasa a nih thu a sawi a. A tul ang zela hma la turin sorkar a inhuam thu khawtlang hruaitute hi a hrilh nghal a ni.

Saipum khawtlang hruaitute chuan he hmun hi an pual ram, Saipum ram ngei a nih thu uar takin an sawi a, Assam lam atanga he hmalakna hi an kalpui tlang zel a nih chuan nakin zelah ramri buaina hlawm lian zawk a chhuah theih dawn thu an thlen a. Sorkar chu a hma thei ang bera hma la turin an ngen a, remna leh muanna nena he harsatna chinfel a nih theih dan tur kawng hrang hrang an sawiho nghal bawk a ni.

title: AIZAWL-AH NERPC MEETING VAWI 31-NA NEIH A NI
content:
4798/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 12th March 2026 :Vawiin khan North Eastern Regional Power Committee (NERPC) Meeting vawi 31-na chu, KTP Youth Recreation Centre, Falkland, Aizawl-ah neih a ni a. Power & Electricity Department Minister F. Rodingliana’n hun hmanpuiin, Meghalaya Power Minister leh NERPC Chairman ni bawk Metbah Lyngdoh te, NERPC Member Secretary B. Lyngkhoi te bakah hmarchhak state hrang hrang atanga mi thiam leh hotu lian tak takte he hunah hian an tel a. Energy-a intodelhna tur te, kawlphetha leh infrastructure lama hmasawnna tur chungchangte sawi ho a ni.

P&E Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan, NERPC meeting hi Mizoram-in a vawi khat thlenna a nih thu leh lawmawm a tih thu sawiin Power & Electricity lama Mizoram hmasawnnate tarlang a. Mizoram chu Ministry of New & Renewable Energy-in tun hnaiah North East-a che tha ber pawl (best-performing states) zingah a puan thu sawiin hman tangkai loh hausakna (untapped wealth) a neih hnem thu te, CWC survey report-ah pawh Hydro Power 3,660 MW siam chhuah theihna a neih thu te, Pumped Storage Project (PSP) ah pawh 10,000 MW aia tam siam chhuah theihna a neih thu te leh NISE report-ah pawh tarlan a nih danin nizung chakna atangin 9.09 GW siam chhuah theihna a neih thute a sawi bawk a. Heng theihna nasa tak Mizoram-in a neihte hi a taka thar chhuah a nih zel theih nan hmalak mek zel a nih thu sawiin, thawh hona tha a ngaih pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Tun dinhmuna Mizoram P&E department hmalakna langsar zual tarlante chu:

• Power Generation Progress: Tuirini Hydel Project (24 MW), NDB funded niin hna thawh tan a ni tawh a. Tuivai HEP (132 MW) leh Tlawng HP (102 MW) te tan Detailed Project Reports (DPR) peih fel thawkhat a ni tawh bawk.

• Solar Expansion: December 2025 khan Thenzawl Solar Plant (10 MWp) hawn a ni a. Sumsuih-ah 5 MWp plant siam mek a nih bakah, 46 MWp dang siam leh turin tender buaipui mek a ni bawk.

• Grid Infrastructure: Chite Aizawl Sub-Station leh 132kV Bairabi-West Phaileng line te hawn a ni tawh a. Lawngtlai, Marpara, leh Thingsulthliah sub-station tharte chu March 2026 hmaa zawh hman tum a ni.

• Modernization: RDSS scheme hnuaiah Prepaid Smart Metering leh Aerial Bunch Cables (ABC) te Aizawl khawpui chhungah hman tan a ni a, hei hian kawlphetha hloh tur a ti hniam dawn a ni.

Heng bakah hian Minister F. Rodingliana chuan Central Sawrkarah power sector bik tan Gross Budgetary Support (GBS) chu 10% atanga 20% a dah turin leh ramngaw hman man Net Present Value (NPV) rate sang lutuk chu tih hniam sak tura a lo ngen tawh thu a sawi bawk.

Meghalaya Power Minister leh NERPC Chairman ni bawk Pu Metbah Lyngdoh pawhin thu sawiin North Eastern Region-hote transmission & distribution loss sang lutuk chu a ngaimawh thu sawiin India ram average ai maha kan san thu sawiin tan kan lak nasat a ngaih thu a sawi a. Hei bakah hian hmasawnna hna thawh nana forest hman man/tih chereu man Net Present Value – NPV charge sang lutukin NE state, Forest cover tamna ramte tan hmasawnna hnathawh a tih thuanawp nasat thu sawiin NPV senso hi Central sorkarin a tum emaw, a nih loh leh, ramngaw neih tam dan azir emawa he chawi tur bituk hi tih hniam ni se tiin a rawt bawk.

Member Secretary B. Lyngkhoi pawhin NERPC chu mipui tana kawlphetha rintlak leh man tlawm zawk a awm theih nana inrawnkhawmna hmun pawimawh ber a nih thu sawiin ‘hmasawnna hna hrang hrang thawhnaah power sector chu a hmahruaitu a nih a ngai’ a ti bawk.

NERPC Meeting vawi 31-naah hian hma lak ho theihna dan tur hrang hrangte rel niin India hmarchhaka ramngaw leh tui chakna te chu hlawk tak leh dik taka hman a nih theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

NERPC hi India hmarchhak State 7 te'n power supply hnianghnar leh rintlak an neih theih nan Electricity Act, 2003 hnuaia din a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah DC in Bawlhhlawh paih chungchanga hriattirna a chhuah
content:
4797/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 12th March, 2026:Serchhip Zawlpui kawng, Thenzawl panna kawng leh hmun hrang hrangah dân lova bawlhhlawh paih an awm thin tih hriat a ni a, a paihna tur hmun lova bawlhhlawh paih hi dânin a khap tlat a, 'The Mizoram Solid Waste Management Bye Laws 2018', Schedule 1 No. 4.1 in a sawi angin Rs. 5,000 thleng chawitir theih a ni.

Bawlhhlawh paih thintute hria emaw lo hmu emaw chuan Deputy Commissioner Office leh UD&PA Office Serchhip ah evidence (thlalak, video clip etc.) nen a report theih reng a, a report tu hming, veng leh nihna thup sakin lawmman siamsak an ni ang. Report hi VANTLANG VILTU app kaltlang pawhin a pek theih reng a ni.

title: Serchhipah District Magistrate in Baktawng leh Chhuanthar Tlangnuam huam chhunga Furniture Workshop neite zawm tur hriattirna chhuah
content:
4796/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 12th March, 2026:Serchhip District Magistrate Office lehkha No. A.60012/02//2012-DC (SRCP) dt. 09/02/2026 a tỉh chhuah tawh angin Baktawng leh Chhuanthar Tlangnuam huam chhunga Furniture Workshop-te atanga thingnawi leh rawng kahna khu te hian mihring hriselna a nghawng bakah vantlang tan harsatna a thlen thu dawn a ni a. A hnuaia inkaihhruaina tarlante zawm nih theih nan in hrilhhriatna leh puanzarna pawh neih ni tawhin, hetiang sumdawnna leh eizawnna ten mihring hriselna atana harsatna an thlenin emaw, vantlang tana harsatna an thlen a nih chuan, chutiang khapna leh khuahkhirh theihna chu District Magistrate hnen ah pek a ni a.

Pu Paul L Khuma, Serchhip District Magistrate chuan Section 152 (b) of BNSS, 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia inkaihruaina te hi Baktawng leh Chhuanthar Tlangnuam huam chhunga Furniture Workshop nei zawng zawng ten an zawm vek tur a ni tih thupek a chhuah:

1. Kawng sira thing zai, thing nawh, rawng kah te khap tlat a ni.

2. Kawng sirah Vangtlang tana hnawksak turin bungrua heng - Thing leh hnathawhna hmanrua te dah/chhek loh tur a ni.

3. Rawng kap leh thing nawt ten an Workshop atanga hnathawhna khu a chhuah loh nan inzarphui tur a ni a, hnathawkte pawn Mask vuah zel tur a ni.

4. Hnathawna khu te pawnlama a chhuah loh nan rang taka vacuum cleaner emaw hmanraw dang humanga thenfai zung zung tur a ni.

He thupek hian chhuah a nih atanga thla ruk (six months) chhung a huam ang.

He Inkaihhruaina dan zawm lote chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin kum khat (1 year) thleng lungin tan emaw, Rs. 5,000 (sangnga) thleng a chawitir emaw, a pahnih hmang pawhin hrem theih a ni ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN  DISTRICT WATER & SANITATION MISSION THUKHAWM NEIH NIIN JAL MAHOTSAV HAWNNA NRIH NGHAL A NI
content:
4795/2025-2026

Lawngtlai 12th March 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Water & Sanitation Mission chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihruaiiin DC Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei a, Bawrhsap chuan 'Jal Mahotsav' hawnna a nei nghal.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hlawk leh tangkai taka hman tura 'Jal Mahotsav' a hawn thu a sawi a. Jal Mahotsav' (Tui Kût) chuan Lawngtlai District - ah a tha zawnga ngawng a neih ngei a beisei tih a sawi a. tui hna siam leh tui renchem kawngah harh thar a tul hle tiin, Lawngtlai mipuite hemi kawnga theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni. Tui thianghlim tel lovin mihring tan khawsak a harsa hle tih tarlangin, tui thianghlim awm tura tui hna siam leh enkawl kawngah chak taka hmalak a tul hle a ni, a ti.

Bawrhsap chuan tui hna siam turin ramngaw humhalh a tul hle a ti a, a bik takin kangmei chhuak lo tura hmalak a pawimawh hle a ti. Ramngaw tihchereuin sik leh sa bakah tuihna a ti tlem nasa hle tih tarlangin, mipuite ramngaw humhalh kawngah bung thar kai turin a fuih a ni. Lawngtlai khawpui leh khaw dangah te tui thianghlim in tur tha zawk a awm theih nana theihtawp chhuah turin Department hotute a chah nghal bawk.

Jal Mahotsav (Tui Kût), hi kum tinin March ni 8 atanga 22nd March thleng hman thin a ni a. Kumin thupui atan hian “Gaon ka Utsav, Desh ka Mahotsav” (Village's festival, nation's festival) - Khawtlang Kût, Ram Kût ' tih thlan a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai Distrcit Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) Member- te an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: Serchhhipah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) neih tur chungchangah thutkhawm pawimawh koh a ni
content:
4794/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 12th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Election Officer Pu Paul L Khuma, Serchhip DC ni bawk chuan DC Meeting Hall ah political party te leh tlawmngai pawl te koin, Serchhip District-a Special Intensive Revision (SIR) neih tur chungchang a sawifiah.

Meeting ah hian kan hma lawka Special Intensive Revision lo awm tur chungchang kalkhawmte hrilhfiah niin SIR ah hian kum 2005 atanga 2026 thlenga electoral roll siamdik/siamthat tur a ni dawn a. DEO Pu Paul L Khuma chuan tlawmngai pawlte leh Political Party te chu Mizoram leh Mizo hnam tana electoral roll felfai tak kan neih theih nan thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

Election Officer Pi Lalchhanhimi chuan SIR kalpui dan tur a chinchhuakin a tarlang a. Block Level Officer (BLO) te chuan an bial chhunga in tinah lutin an endik (house to house verification) vek dawn, tih a sawi bawk.

Vawiin meeting ah hian political party tin aiawh te bakah tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah Districtah Vohbik leh Kum 60 chunglam tan Camp buatsaih dawn
content:
4793/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 12nd March, 2026:Serchhip District chhungah Vohbikte leh kum 60 chin chunglam tan ni 16-20.3.2026 chhung hian Camp buatsaih tur a ni a, a hnuaia hun leh hmun tarlanah hian a mamawh tute tan pan theih an ni ang.

He camp ah hian a hnuai a tarlan te hi dil theih a ni ang:

1) Hearing Aid2) Braille Kit3) Sugamya Cane4) Smartphone with screen Reading5) Walking Stick6) Wheel Chair7) Rollator8) Tetrapod9) Tripod10) Crutch11) Wheelchair with commode13 Cerebra aral or Chair14) Spinal Support15) Knee Brace16) Silicon foam

A dil duhte chuan hengte hi ken tel tur a ni.

i) Aadhaar Card (Xerox Copy)ii) UDID Card for PwD(Xerox Copy)iii) Income Proof Original for PwD (Thlakhat ah Rs.22,500/- aia tam lo) Kumlama upa tan thlakhatah (Rs 15,000 hnuai lam) VC atanga lak tur.iv) Passport Size Photo.v) Hearing Aid dil tan Audiogram/ Audiologist Report (Xerox Copy)

Ni A hun Khua A hmun

16-17 March 11:00 AM E. Lungdar Community Hall18-19 March 11:00 AM Serchhip CMO Conference Hall20 March    11:00 AM    Chhingchhip    Community Hall, Mualpui
